issues.title: Onboarding URLs deleted from urlpatterns
issues.attack: Step 3 replaces entire urlpatterns, dropping invite/pending/rejected routes. Breaks onboarding flow.
issues.response: Clear regression. Plan must preserve existing routes and only append new settings tab URLs.

issues.title: Missing templates cause TemplateDoesNotExist
issues.attack: Views reference settings_email/telegram/notify.html which don't exist. Tests will fail with TemplateDoesNotExist.
issues.response: Templates deferred to t14 by design. Added stub templates step so tests pass. Rebut full template creation in t13 scope.

issues.title: Root URL home duplicated in accounts/urls.py
issues.attack: Step 3 adds home route but main/urls.py already owns it. Creates t03 regression risk.
issues.response: accounts/urls.py has explicit comment noting home is in main/urls.py. Removed from Step 3.

issues.title: Tests too weak — only check status code
issues.attack: Tests only assert status_code == 200. Wrong template rendering would still pass.
issues.response: Added assertTemplateUsed and HTMX partial check. Full content assertions deferred to t14.

issues.title: telegram_bind_partial disconnected from UI flow
issues.attack: New endpoint added but no template references it. Existing templates still use old URLs.
issues.response: Endpoint is infrastructure for t14 templates. Must exist before templates can reference it.

issues.title: NotificationPreference/Form dependency not in File Map
issues.attack: settings_notify uses models/forms not listed in File Map, suggesting they don't exist.
issues.response: Both exist from t11 (model, commit 42cb509) and t12 (form, commit 9b2a7e1). File Map lists only files modified by t13.

issues.title: Dangling email_settings URL
issues.attack: Both email_settings and settings_email serve email-related functionality.
issues.response: Different purposes: settings_email = GET tab view, email_settings = POST config handler.

issues.title: Cross-app import circular reference risk
issues.attack: accounts/views.py imports from projects app models.
issues.response: EmailMonitorConfig and TelegramBinding are in accounts/models.py, not projects. No cross-app import.
